suppress.notes:
As we trust the XLSX files we import, we are safe to ignore this vulnerability
note that there isn't currently a version of dataframe-excel that use a version of POI that resolves this issue. Once there is, we should upgrade to it and remove this suppression
file name: applicationinsights-core-2.6.4.jar Suppressed as this is an Azure SDK dependency, not application insights.
Suppression for dompurify issue as only bundled with swagger-ui and swagger docs should only be available in dev. file name: swagger-ui-5.32.0.jar: swagger-ui-bundle.js
Suppression for dompurify issue as only bundled with swagger-ui and swagger docs should only be available in dev. file name: swagger-ui-5.32.0.jar: swagger-ui-bundle.js
Suppression for dompurify issue as only bundled with swagger-ui and swagger docs should only be available in dev. file name: swagger-ui-5.32.0.jar: swagger-ui-bundle.js
Suppression for dompurify issue as only bundled with swagger-ui and swagger docs should only be available in dev. file name: swagger-ui-5.32.0.jar: swagger-ui-bundle.js
Suppression for dompurify issue as only bundled with swagger-ui and swagger docs should only be available in dev. file name: swagger-ui-5.32.0.jar: swagger-ui-bundle.js
